content:
FIANNA Fail TD Malcolm Byrne has announced his resignation as Chair of the Joint Oireachtas Committee on Artificial Intelligence.
It comes after he was arrested by gardai last week on suspicion of drink driving.

title: What happens when human power outruns human wisdom? | Opinion
description: Tools like artificial intelligence amplify the moral condition of the people wielding them.
content:
The author argues that human wisdom must grow alongside technological power to avoid negative consequences.
The article compares modern technological advancements to the ancient story of the Tower of Babel.

title: World shares mostly decline
description: World shares were mostly lower and South Korea’s benchmark dropped more than five per cent on Friday after sharp declines for some big artificial intelligence-related stocks in the U.S.
content:

title: AI Wonk Has a Plan for People to Get $60,000 a Year With No Work

title: DARPA launches AI Forge to accelerate national security AI research

content:
AI Forge aims to create a new research ecosystem focused on advancing foundational AI capabilities.

title: Artificial Intelligence no longer speculative technology but an operational reality: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant
description: India's Chief Justice Surya Kant states artificial intelligence is an operational reality. It presents a major challenge for international law. Decisions made now will define technology's role in power, freedom, and justice. He adds that the central challenge is the human authorship over the principles that govern AI. AI can aid justice administration by improving efficiency and access, says CJI. However, it also unsettles traditional legal concepts like sovereignty.
content:
